name: Sondas Foley
curation_log: DRAFT seeded from the worked example in entity_resolution_design.pdf §3. Domains and rules are illustrative until the M1 schema procedure runs on the real corpus (numeric+discrete mining, price-discrimination test, expert curation, reference validation, dry run to <1% illegal-value rate). Do not mark 'launched' before that.
Domains start generous on purpose: broadening a domain is the only free schema edit; adding/removing identity attributes is a migration.

attribute_defs.name: calibre
attribute_defs.curation_notes: ch / french / n° surface forms -> Fr. mm->Fr conversion (5.33 mm -> 16Fr) deferred to curation. Last rule is category-context: bare number right after 'foley'.

attribute_defs.name: material
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Rule order matters: latex_siliconado must match before plain latex/silicona. Canonical values are lowercase ASCII tokens (graph property values); display names can map later.

attribute_defs.name: vias
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Number words (dos/tres) are digitized by the normalizer table, so one rule covers both.

attribute_defs.name: capacidad_balon
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Identity by clinical call in the design's worked example despite price overlap. Context-anchored on 'balon' so syringe-style volumes don't leak in.

attribute_defs.name: color_envase
attribute_defs.curation_notes: Descriptive: normalized but never part of equality (design §3 example).
